title: Planks with nails (Nailed it!)
description: a simple pack that gives planks nails.
body:
A small pack that gives planks nails!
![all 11 vanilla woodsets that use the standard plank texture.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6ae1806f9e224b755bcbed8b4689e77c3af04cc.png)
for those who might yearn for a slightly gritter texture, or have a bit of a nostalgia bias but dislike the rather rough look of programmer art. Has built-in Mod compatibility for the following mods:
- Abnormal's
- Alex's Caves
- Quark
- Prehistoric Fauna
- Ecologics
- Windswept!
- Would
- No Man's Land
